entry.title: New: CR 24-67 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-101, CD1, to accept a donation of equipment from Lochland Holdings, LLC, for the Department of Fire and Public Safety, under Chapter 3.56, Maui County Code, as follows: two Honda Aqua Trax F-15 jet skis, one CESMITH 12-foot Smith Trailer, and one WCE-1250/900-40 Karavan Trailer.

Disaster, Resilience, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
